name: agentic-design-patterns
description: 28 agentic design pattern skills covering the full spectrum of AI agent development — from foundational patterns to advanced multi-agent systems. Supports English, Korean, Japanese, and Chinese trigger phrases.

settings.name: Preferred Model
settings.description: Gemini model to use with this extension. Recommended: gemini-2.5-flash (balanced) or gemini-2.5-pro (complex reasoning). Leave blank to use Gemini CLI default.
